description: Replace zero-trade baseline acceptance criterion with multi-objective fitness that penalizes inaction. Implement Pareto front tracking for strategies with trades > MIN_TRADES, accepting non-dominated solutions by (Sharpe, win_rate, trade_count). Initialize LLM with best trading strategy (Sharpe -4.44, 407 trades, 44% win rate) rather than zero-trade baseline. Add constraint: reject any strategy with trades < MIN_TRADES to force exploration of trading solutions. Replace greedy best-only criterion with elite population that maintains diverse trading strategies.

Implement a robust halt mechanism that strictly enforces hard halts based on research document directives. This involves ensuring the ODIN execution loop reads and acts upon halt commands before initiating any optimization or strategy execution. The current failure mode, where halts are ignored, must be addressed at a fundamental level.
